name: Nucleotide Excision Repair
description: Nucleotide excision repair: bulky DNA lesions are recognized by global-genome (XPC) or transcription-coupled sensing, TFIIH opens the helix, the damage is verified, dual incision excises a short oligonucleotide, and the gap is filled and ligated.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Bulky DNA lesion (UV)"]
    N2{"Recognition route?"}
    N3["XPC detects distortion"]
    N4["Stalled RNA pol signals"]
    N5["TFIIH unwinds lesion"]
    N6["XPA/RPA verify damage"]
    N7["XPF + XPG dual incision"]
    N8["Excise ~24-32 nt oligo"]
    N9["Gap-filling synthesis"]
    N10["Ligation"]
    N11["Repaired DNA"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|GG-NER| N3
    N2 -->|TC-NER| N4
    N3 --> N5
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 --> N8
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 --> N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N4 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N5 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N6 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N7 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N8 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N9 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N10 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style N11 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

nodeDetails.label: Stalled RNA pol signals
nodeDetails.detail: TC-NER triggered at lesions blocking transcription

nodeDetails.label: TFIIH unwinds lesion
nodeDetails.detail: Helicases open DNA around the damage

flowchartStandard.name: source_grounded_extraction_v2
flowchartStandard.sourceGrounding: Nodes, decisions, branches, and loops were extracted from the cited sources; each node carries a sourceRef to its supporting citation. Awaiting human spot-check before verified=true.

notes: Source-grounded extraction (v2): node content derived from cited protocol literature with per-node provenance; topology reflects the actual procedure.
